title: calystegia collina subsp. apicum
intro: Calystegia collina subsp. apicum, also known as the apical bindweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the morning glory family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Calystegia collina subsp. apicum include relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as a reduction in blood pressure and improvement in cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
